title: Clemens Mayr
content:
Partner, Business Law
People.ContactEmail cmayr@mccarthy.ca
- Université de Montréal
Clemens Mayr is a partner in the Firm’s Montréal office and a member of our Board of Partners. His practice focuses on corporate finance, international financings, and mergers and acquisitions. Clemens has substantial visibility in the Québec market and legal community. He practises in the areas of securities and corporate law, particularly in mergers and acquisitions, take-over bids and public financings, and has been involved in numerous mergers and acquisitions, as well as venture capital financings. He has also acted in numerous Canadian and cross-border public financings (including initial public offerings), acting for both issuers and underwriters in various industry segments such as pulp and paper, high technology, biotechnology and communications.

#### Professional Activities:
Past President and Chief Executive Officer of the Institute of Corporate Directors – Québec Chapter; andmember of boards of directors of public and private corporations.
Clemens was born in Innsbruck, Austria. He received his LLB from the Université de Montréal in 1990 and was called to the Québec bar in 1991. He is fluent in English, French and German.
